mapper.select: SELECT code_group_id AS id, code_group_name AS name, description, use_yn AS isActive FROM tb_common_code_group ORDER BY code_group_id

SELECT code_id AS id, code_group_id AS groupCode, code_id AS code, code_name AS name, code_value AS value, COALESCE(sort_order, 0) AS sortOrder, use_yn AS isActive, description FROM tb_common_code WHERE code_id = #{codeId}
